---
title: "Appending Selected Pages To The Previous Document"
---

---
title: "Appending Selected Pages to the Previous Document"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Capture/amp1646248502307"
section: "Hyland Capture"
---

You can append selected pages of a document to the previous document. When you append the selected pages to the previous document, the pages of the current document are added immediately after the last page of the previous document.

To append selected pages to the previous document:

1.  On the relevant document area, do one of the following:
-
To select a single page, click the thumbnail image of the page that you want to merge and select the check box in the upper-left corner.

-
To select multiple pages, click the thumbnail image and select the check box in the upper-left corner of each thumbnail image. A tick appears on the selected pages.

-
To select all pages in a document, click the vertical ellipsis icon in the upper-right corner of the document area and then select Select all pages from the drop-down menu.

2.  In the upper-right corner of the document area, click the vertical ellipsis icon.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
A drop-down menu is displayed.

3.  Click Append selected pages above or press Alt + P. The selected pages are appended to the previous document.
